overrides.reason: Atomic components do not include prerecorded audio-only or video-only content.
Atomic components do not include synchronized media requiring captions.
Atomic components do not include prerecorded video content requiring audio descriptions.
Atomic components do not include live audio content.
Atomic components do not include prerecorded video content.
Atomic components do not produce audio output.
Bypass blocks is a page-level concern — skip links and landmark regions are the responsibility of the consuming application.
Page titles are set at the document level by the consuming application, not by embedded components.
Multiple ways to locate content is a site architecture concern — navigation mechanisms are the responsibility of the consuming application.
Atomic components do not implement device motion-based interactions.
Atomic components do not require dragging movements — all interactions have single-pointer alternatives.
Consistent help mechanisms are an application-level concern — Atomic provides UI primitives, not help systems.
Error prevention for legal, financial, or data transactions is a business logic concern handled by the consuming application.
Redundant entry prevention for multi-step processes is an application-level concern — Atomic provides form primitives, not process flows.
Atomic components do not implement authentication flows.
